description_long: This is a compact, boxy fire truck painted in a vibrant red color with black trim and detailing. The vehicle features four large wheels with rugged tires, a roof rack, and four prominent emergency lights mounted on the roof. The front of the truck displays a spare tire on the hood, a mesh grille, and a yellow license plate. The windows are large and rectangular, providing ample visibility for the driver and crew. The bodywork shows some stylized flame graphics along the lower edge, and the overall design is utilitarian, suggesting a focus on function and durability. The truck lacks visible fire department insignia, hose connections, or a ladder rack, giving it a simplified, stylized appearance.
description: A compact, red fire truck with a boxy shape, roof-mounted emergency lights, and a spare tire on the hood. It features large windows, rugged wheels, and stylized flame graphics along the lower body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat windshield, two large windows, yellow license plate, and the absence of a visible grille or spare tire.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the boxy body, large side windows, roof rack, and the spare tire mounted on the hood.
description_view_2: Front view with a clear view of the spare tire on the hood, mesh grille, and four emergency lights on the roof.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side windows, roof rack, and the spare tire on the hood.
